3268430.name: Warriors
3268430.description:
Greetings Warrior!

You have been hand-picked by the Gods to prove your might! WARRIORS is a chaotic, physics-based multiplayer brawler where you must slice, smash, and battle your way through brutally fun rounds of mayhem. Compete against 15 other champions in various arenas, each with its own twist on combat. Only the strongest, fastest, and craftiest will survive the trials and emerge as the ultimate champion of the Gods!

Brutal PvP Rounds

Face off against up to 15 players in 16-player lobbies. Each round, only the strongest warriors will advance until one remains victorious and the ALL have their own set of rules and objectives:

  • Storm the Castle – Navigate treacherous traps and obstacles like boulders, fireballs, and spikes.

  • Sacrifice – In this gory showdown, feed your enemies (or yourself) to a hungry dragon.

  • Capture the Crown – Only the nimblest can carry the coveted crown to the throne without being taken down.

  • Master of Mayhem – Jump, dodge, and fight your way to the top!

Diverse Arsenal

Choose between several standard weapons (sword, axe, hammer, and more!) and seek out the rare legendary weapons like Excalibur and Mjölnir for an edge in battle. 

Disclaimer: When swinging, hurling, or otherwise misusing weapons on your fellow warriors, critical injuries may occur, including (but not limited to): loss of limbs, spontaneous decapitation, and/or severe external hemorrhaging. Proceed with caution, and remember, what doesn’t kill you, might just make you lose an arm! 

An ever-changing Arena

Every two months, dive into a new theme with fresh maps, customization options, and new challenges. The first theme brings a medieval mix of castles, dragons, and knights. 

Disclaimer: WARRIORS doesn’t shy away from cartoonish violence in a fun and lighthearted way. The over-the-top gore and hilariously exaggerated animations ensure that while the stakes are high, you'll be laughing all the way to victory.

英语*
